title: Production Ready V1 reskin + planner banner cleanup
description:
Removed the DB3-backed pipe view info banner from Segment Planner. Expanded Production Ready V1 theme polish across all PipeSync modules — planner tree, Plan View workspace, footage, reports, contacts, email, modals, and overlays — plus more tooltips and modal guides. Core behavior unchanged; select Production Ready V1 from the site menu Theme dropdown.

Who is affected: PipeSync users on pipeshare.live.
changeLog: Removed DB3-backed pipe view banner from Segment Planner.
Production Ready V1: reskin for planner, Plan View, footage, reports, contacts, email.
More theme tooltips and modal guides (import, map builder, download plans).
Prior: WinCan placeholder removed, Plan Sync saved groups UX.
